name: logistics coordinators processing 10-20 delivery logs/month tool
description: For logistics coordinators processing 10-20 delivery logs/month, inefficient reimbursement claims cause cash flow gaps. We automate mileage claims instead of manual calculation and submission of mileage claims.
problem_solved: Inefficient reimbursement claims for fleet mileage
